---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

This page contains a small example project created with R Markdown.

## Project 1: Exploring the `cars` dataset

The built-in `cars` dataset contains measurements of car speed and stopping distance.

In this example, the relationship between speed and stopping distance is explored with R code and visualized with a simple scatter plot.

```{r cars-data, echo=TRUE}
head(cars)
```

```{r cars-summary, echo=TRUE}
summary(cars)
```

```{r cars-plot, echo=FALSE}
plot(
  cars$speed,
  cars$dist,
  xlab = "Speed",
  ylab = "Stopping distance",
  main = "Stopping Distance by Speed"
)
```

The plot shows that stopping distance tends to increase as speed increases.
